name: Elena Renault
title: Elena Renault

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Danse d'Argent
basic.description: Elena attacks enemies in front with her mercury.

core.name: Trahison d'Argent
core.description: Elena slashes the enemy, then moves behind her target and creates an additional mercury sword to strike again.

skill.name: Piège d'Argent
skill.description: Elena leaps at the enemy and strikes downward, causing mercury droplets to splash upward and explode, damaging nearby enemies.

skill.name: Furie d'Argent
skill.description: Elena quickly slashes the enemy multiple times then steps back and throws a mercury sword. Grants [Tide of Silver] to the entire team: Water damage +10%, Water Overload damage +15% (40s).

support.name: Triple Estoc
support.description: Elena moves swiftly, stabs the enemy twice, then finishes with a powerful jab. Grants [Fatal Obsession] to the entire team: Water damage +15%, Water Overload damage +20%, Shield equal to 30% of Elena's DEF, Power Gauge +10% (30s).

qte.name: Éclat de Folie
qte.description: Elena creates a mercury shield in front of herself, then detonates it to damage nearby enemies. Grants [Obsession's Grasp] to the entire team: Shield, HP recovery, and MP recovery based on Elena's DEF. Triggers via Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, Stun, Blind, or Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Prison d'Argent
ultimate.description: Elena manifests her inner emotions as mercury, trapping enemies with the constructs before detonating them to deal damage.

passive.name: Mercury Arts
passive.description: Using Danse d'Argent activates Trahison d'Argent once. When Danse d'Argent hits, inflicts 1 instance of [Winter Chill] (100% DEF damage every 3s for 30s, stacks up to 10 times). Using Furie d'Argent grants the entire team [Tide of Silver]: Water damage +10%, Water Overload damage +15% (40s). Using Éclat de Folie grants the entire team [Obsession's Grasp]: Shield, HP restoration, and MP restoration based on Elena's DEF.

advancements: The entire team gains [Feral Gaze] at the start of the stage (Critical Hit Rate +5%, Critical Hit Damage +10%, Infinite). When an ally inflicts Water Overload damage, increases all Water team members' Water Overload damage by 15% for 40s. Using Prison d'Argent restores the entire team's Power Gauge by 10%. When Furie d'Argent hits a target with [Winter Chill], inflicts [Mercury Drip] on the target (Water damage taken +10%, Water Overload damage taken +15%, 40s).
The entire team's Attack, Defense, and Max HP increases by 9%.

[Tide of Silver] and [Obsession's Grasp] effects are enhanced. Piège d'Argent hits now inflict 2 instances of [Winter Chill]. When the user or a Water team member uses a Core Attack or Basic Skill, restores 10% of Elena Renault's Power Gauge (Cooldown: 1s). Enhanced [Tide of Silver]: Water damage +20%, Water Overload damage +30% (40s). Enhanced [Obsession's Grasp]: Shield (30% DEF), HP restoration (5% DEF every 3s), 30 MP restored every 3s (40s).
The entire team's Water Overload damage increases by 20%.

[Feral Gaze] and [Mercury Drip] effects are enhanced. When an ally inflicts Water Overload damage, all Water team members' Water Overload damage increases by 30% for 40s. 80% of the user's Power Gauge is charged at the start of the stage. Prison d'Argent inflicts 3 instances of [Winter Chill] on the target. Enhanced [Feral Gaze]: Critical Hit Rate +25%, Critical Hit Damage +32% (Infinite). Enhanced [Mercury Drip]: Water damage taken +15%, Water Overload damage taken +20% (40s).
